case_title: RITA LUSHTAK VS. CHARLES R. BEESON

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $800.00 FILED BY LUSHTAK, RITA AS TO DEFENDANT BEESON, CHARLES R. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-27-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUSHTAK, RITA AS TO DEFENDANT BEESON, CHARLES R.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-17-2012, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BEESON, CHARLES R.
NOTICE OF VENUE CHALLENGE MAILED TO ALL PARTIES.
VENUE CHALLENGE FILED BY DEFENDANT BEESON, CHARLES R.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. "DEFENDANT'S CHALLENGE TO VENUE IS GRANTED. PROPER VENUE IS IN SANTA CLARA COUNTY", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. (506)
LETTER RE: CHANGE OF VENUE FROM CHARLES R. BEESON
